content:
1. Converts temps between C/F/K (via C intermediate) + rejects sub-0K results; used by weather service.
2. Absolute-zero check only runs for Kelvin output; NaN/Inf handling is undecided; no input validation.
3. Whether to validate NaN/Inf inputs vs. letting them propagate.
4. Below-abs-zero inputs for C/F outputs; non-finite values; enum misuse; rounding side-effects.
